esqlQuery.esql:
TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.was_servlet_errors_total IS NOT NULL
  OR metrics.was_servlet_requests_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    error_rate = SUM(RATE(metrics.was_servlet_errors_total)),
    request_rate = SUM(RATE(metrics.was_servlet_requests_total))
  BY host.name, attributes.appname
| WHERE request_rate > 0
| EVAL error_pct = ROUND(COALESCE(error_rate, 0.0) / request_rate * 100.0, 2)
// Threshold: alert when error rate exceeds 5% of total requests
// Adjust based on acceptable error tolerance for your applications
| WHERE error_pct > 5.0
| SORT error_pct DESC
